org.springframework.data.expression.ValueExpression

Package
Description
org.springframework.data.expression
Value Expression implementation.
org.springframework.data.repository.query
Support classes to work with query methods.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ValueExpression
    ValueExpressionParser.parse(String expressionString)
    Parses the expression string and return an Expression object you can use for repeated evaluation.
